contactInfo.title: Zambiri za Kupezeka
contactInfo.headsUpMessage: Ngakhale kuti izi ndi zachisankho, kupereka (zoona) zambiri kudzathandiza kulimbitsa ubale wathu komanso kuchepetsa chigawo chanu cha Ngozi % ndikupatsani mwachangu ndiponso mwankhwani kufika ku magawo a tsamba (monga kusapereka chitsimikiziro cha khadi la krediti).
